moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Underway!
moments.blurb: The biggest football tournament on the planet, the FIFA World Cup 2026, is in full swing across North America, running from June 11 to July 19.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 is LIVE! Who are you backing to lift the trophy this year? Every game counts now. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK Fan Focus
angles.copy: Is your living room officially a World Cup fan zone? The 2026 tournament is dominating screens and conversations right now. What's been the best match so far?

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: From shock results to stunning goals, the FIFA World Cup 2026 is delivering! Tune in to catch all the action as the group stages heat up.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships are officially underway today, running from June 29 to July 12 at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Kicks Off
angles.copy: Game, Set, Match! Wimbledon 2026 has officially begun. Who are you putting your money on for the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles titles?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's not truly summer until Wimbledon starts! The iconic tennis tournament is live from London. Time for strawberries and cream!

angles.name: British Summer Tradition
angles.copy: Two weeks of world-class tennis, tradition, and unpredictable British weather. Wimbledon is here! Who's your favourite to watch on the grass courts?

moments.title: Glastonbury 2026 Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival 2026 concluded yesterday, June 28th, leaving thousands of festival-goers with muddy boots and unforgettable memories.

angles.name: Post-Glasto Blues
angles.copy: The fields of Worthy Farm are clearing, but the memories (and mud!) of Glastonbury 2026 live on. What was your highlight from the weekend?

angles.name: Best of Glasto
angles.copy: From surprise guests to legendary headliners, Glastonbury 2026 delivered. What was the absolute standout performance for you?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and television personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 today.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, what's your favourite track?

angles.name: Pussycat Doll Power
angles.copy: She's got that 'Don't Cha' vibe! Happy 48th Birthday to pop icon Nicole Scherzinger today. Still slaying!

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry on July 1st! Her influence on music and style is undeniable. What's your top Blondie track?

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Call her! Debbie Harry turns 81 on Wednesday. The Blondie frontwoman defined an era. Celebrate her incredible legacy with us!

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott on July 1st! A true pioneer of hip-hop and music video innovation.

angles.name: Work It
angles.copy: From 'Work It' to the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame, Missy Elliott is a force of nature. Wishing her a fantastic 55th birthday this Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday Lindsay Lohan
moments.blurb: American actress and singer Lindsay Lohan, known for 'Mean Girls' and 'The Parent Trap', turns 40 on July 2nd.

angles.name: Mean Girls Star
angles.copy: On Wednesday, July 2nd, the one and only Lindsay Lohan celebrates her 40th birthday! What's your favourite Lohan movie or song?

angles.name: Child Star to Icon
angles.copy: From 'The Parent Trap' to pop hits, Lindsay Lohan turns 40 this week! A true noughties icon. Happy Birthday!

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday Post Malone
moments.blurb: Chart-topping American singer, rapper, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Saturday, July 4th! What's your go-to Posty anthem?

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: From 'Sunflower' to his latest country ventures, Post Malone turns 31 this weekend! Celebrate the versatile artist with us.

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actor Huey Lewis, known for his band Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square! Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday, July 5th. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 76th birthday to Huey Lewis this weekend! Get ready to feel 'The Power of Love'.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Scotland's major music event, TRNSMT Festival, takes over Glasgow Green from July 10th-12th, featuring a packed lineup of artists.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Calling
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is just around the corner! Glasgow Green will be buzzing with live music from July 10th. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Planning your trip to TRNSMT? The huge Scottish festival kicks off next week! Get ready for three days of incredible live acts.

moments.title: Exeter Craft Festival Returns
moments.blurb: The Exeter Craft Festival is set to bring local artisans and craftspeople to Exeter Cathedral Green from July 5th-7th.

angles.name: Local Craft Showcase
angles.copy: Get ready to explore incredible local talent! The Exeter Craft Festival takes over Cathedral Green this weekend, July 5th-7th. Support local makers!

angles.name: Weekend in Exeter
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? The Exeter Craft Festival is perfect for finding unique gifts and enjoying the vibrant atmosphere on Cathedral Green, starting this Sunday!
